module_header: module valid_ready_slice(input logic clk, input logic rst_n, input logic in_valid, output logic in_ready, input logic [7:0] in_data, output logic out_valid, input logic out_ready, output logic [7:0] out_data);
prompt: Implement a single-entry ready/valid pipeline slice. The module accepts input data when in_valid and in_ready are both 1, stores one item, and presents it on out_data with out_valid asserted until the downstream side accepts it with out_ready. The slice must support a simultaneous dequeue and enqueue in the same cycle without inserting a bubble.
